CustomField.description: Identifies the individual’s current citizenship or residency status for compliance, reporting, and eligibility purposes. Used to distinguish whether the contact is a U.S. citizen, permanent resident (Green Card holder), or holds a visa.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the contact’s current citizenship or residency status: • US Citizen – The person holds U.S. citizenship. • Green Card – The person is a lawful permanent resident. • Visa – The person is in the U.S. on a temporary visa. • N/A – Not applicable or information not provided.
CustomField.label: Visa Status
